title: Lindackeria cuneatoacuminata
taxonomy: Lindackeria cuneatoacuminata belongs to the family Scyphostegiaceae. It is native to Africa, specifically the tropical regions. Further classification includes the order Malpighiales and the class Magnoliopsida. Lindackeria cuneatoacuminata is part of the genus Lindackeria, which comprises a limited number of plant species. The classification of Lindackeria cuneatoacuminata is still a subject of ongoing research and may be refined as new information becomes available.
